PROP-baseauction-inv-090.text: transmit pre-validation decodes feedId from UNVERIFIED data — must not trust content beyond feedId.
PROP-baseauction-inv-090.assertion: pre-validation only reads bytes32(reportData) for feedId check, no other fields trusted

locations.note: lines 142-149: pre-validation loop only decodes reportData bytes and reads bytes32(reportData) for feedId; full decode via verifyBulk at line 153
